notes: Congressional/Senate hearings do not publish route lists. This file captures only what was explicitly cited in hearings or congressional media coverage. Aggregate statistics confirmed: ~950 jeepney routes in NCR (555 consolidated, 395 without TSE), ~250 UV Express routes (142 consolidated, 108 without), ~68 city bus routes post-rationalization. No geometry or stop data available from this source.

routes.frequency_notes: Cited in PISTON testimony to Senate: only 13 modern jeepneys operating as of Jan 2024; 100 traditional units to be phased out
routes.notes: Route cited in Senate Committee hearing coverage as example of low modernization penetration. Route existence confirmed by multiple sources. No endpoint coordinates available from this source.

routes.frequency_notes: Frequently cited in Senate oversight hearings; 751 buses, 87 operators; 24/7 operation
routes.notes: Confirmed in multiple Senate and House hearings as flagship modernization route. Full data available from EDSA Busway aspect.
